---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Retina
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Retina doesn't support today? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work. A small code sketch of the API you'd want helps:

```python
# the API you wish existed
```

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about or tried.

## Fit with Retina's scope

Retina aims to stay small, model-agnostic, and numpy-only at its core (see
[`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)). How does this fit that scope?

## Additional context

Anything else — links, references, related issues.
